{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Endross
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Grandmaster
| abilities = rolling thunderstorm, Gate
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Grandmaster Endross Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Grandmaster [[Endross]] is a powerful and volatile figure who holds a leadership position within a council. Known for being dangerously unpredictable, he has demonstrated a personal vendetta against [[Simon]] and expressed a desire to personally expel the [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]]. In combat, he is a formidable opponent capable of wielding two swords and manipulating elemental forces, such as a miniature thunderstorm. Despite being wounded in battle, he has shown resilience and an aggressive combat style, including the use of a Gate to confront a rampaging [[Incarnation]]. His temperament is often characterized by anger and a casual attitude toward extreme violence.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A young, dark, and strong man who replaced a predecessor, Grandmaster [[Endross]] is defined by an obsession with combat strength. This lithe and muscled individual emerged from a Gate, possessing dark eyes and the ability to wreathe his left hand in a rolling thunderstorm. While resting his hands upon the hilts of his swords, he wields both two blades and a swirling thunderstorm in battle.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] is young, dark, and strong.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] is obsessed with combat strength.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] has a predecessor he replaced.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] is a lithe, muscled man with dark skin who stepped out of the Gate.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] can wreathe his left hand in a rolling thunderstorm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross]] is a Grandmaster.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross]] uses a Gate.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] has dark eyes and rests his hands on the hilts of his swords.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Endross]] wields two swords and a swirling thunderstorm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Grandmaster Endross stood next to Avernus, his dark eyes fixed on the prisoner. His hands rested on the hilts of his swords as though he was looking for an opportunity to use them."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
